top_signals.title: Stocks Rise and Oil Falls on US-Iran Deal Hopes: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Hopes for a diplomatic way out of the war in Iran spurred a bounce in stocks and bonds as oil dropped on speculation that a deal would revive energy flows through the vital Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Open Interest 5/21/2026
top_signals.summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Matt Miller and Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." Nvidia’s blowout earnings fail to supercharge the AI trade, as investors eye the next wave of mega IPOs from SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic. Plus, Jamie Dimon’s AI hiring shift: more AI staff, fewer bankers Plus,  warnings on the AI debt boom, e.l.f Beauty’s Rhode-fueled surge, and a Trump advisor’s prediction for lower gas prices. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
